profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ San Diego CA — primary corporate IT decisions outside WWT STOLA territory. Oncor subsidiary in Dallas/Irving TX is within STOLA but account owned at corporate level. Channel mismatch applied.

signals.signal_title: RISE with SAP implementation at Sempra Infrastructure — agile platform for LNG operations
signals.signal_description: Sempra Infrastructure is implementing RISE with SAP as an agile, scalable platform for its LNG operations. VP Technology Chantale Rondeau is overseeing the implementation. Represents a significant digital transformation investment and signals appetite for major technology projects.

signals.signal_title: SDG&E Wildfire and Climate Resiliency Center opened — technology-driven wildfire risk mitigation
signals.signal_description: SDG&E opened the Wildfire and Climate Resiliency Center in 2024, deploying advanced monitoring systems, predictive analytics, and real-time wildfire risk mitigation capabilities. Represents active OT/IT investment in climate resilience infrastructure.

signals.signal_title: Oncor $3B System Resiliency Plan approved — grid hardening and OT cybersecurity investment
signals.signal_description: Oncor's $3B System Resiliency Plan was approved as part of its $36B five-year capital plan, including grid hardening, OT cybersecurity upgrades, and advanced metering infrastructure. Largest grid investment program in Texas — significant active IT/OT demand.

spend_model_flags.ms_standardized_notes: Microsoft Azure confirmed as primary cloud. Microsoft 365 in use across enterprise. SAP RISE deployed on Azure at Sempra Infrastructure. Softchoice/WWT licensing opportunity confirmed.
spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: CISO hired within 18 months (+2), SAP RISE implementation active (+2), Wildfire technology program public commitment (+2), Oncor $3B grid resiliency (+2), technology explicitly named in capex guidance (+3 partial — utility-specific). Score 11 — below >=15 threshold. No CAIO, no NVIDIA partnership, no AI CoE identified. Utility-focused technology investment rather than AI-led.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ San Diego CA — outside WWT STOLA territory. Primary corporate IT decisions in San Diego. Oncor in Dallas/Irving TX within STOLA but owned at corporate level.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $13.185B. 16,773 employees. Regulated utility — channel mismatch applied (San Diego HQ outside STOLA). SVP CIO Chris Baker at corporate level. CIO/VP Technology Chantale Rondeau at Infrastructure subsidiary (SAP RISE lead). CISO Jamie Levitt hired Jan 2024. Azure confirmed. SAP RISE confirmed at Infrastructure. No incumbent MSP. Record $48B five-year capex plan. Oncor $36B plan is largest grid investment in Texas. HIGH confidence.
